certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

gaps: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI decision-making
Insufficient documentation on data quality and integrity for inventory management and supply chain requirements analysis
Unclear criteria for escalation rules, particularly for 'when supply chain requirements are unclear'
No evidence of ongoing monitoring and evaluation of AI performance and effectiveness
recommendations: Develop and implement a comprehensive risk management process for AI decision-making, including identification, assessment, and mitigation of potential risks
Establish and maintain detailed documentation on data quality and integrity, including data sources, processing, and storage
Refine escalation rules with clear, measurable criteria and ensure that all stakeholders understand their roles and responsibilities in the escalation process
Implement a continuous monitoring and evaluation program to assess AI performance, identify areas for improvement, and ensure ongoing compliance with ISO/IEC 42001

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: high. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI decision-making
